zh.lifeSummary: 當John Mauncell於1472年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾其勒時，他的父親John Mauncel32歲，母親Joan Savage30歲。他於1491年與Sarah Isabel Wingfield在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1545年11月在他的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾海萊左文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Mauncell于1472年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾其勒时，他的父亲John Mauncel32岁，母亲Joan Savage30岁。他于1491年与Sarah Isabel Wingfield在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1545年11月在他的家乡享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾海萊左文。

nameMeanings.name: Mauncell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mansell
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Old French mansel ‘inhabitant of Le Mans or the surrounding area of Maine’. The place was originally named in Latin (ad) Ceromannos, from the name of the Gaulish tribe living there, the Ceromanni. The name was shortened to Celmans and then became Le Mans as a result of the mistaken identification of the first syllable with the Old French demonstrative adjective.
status name for a particular type of feudal tenant, Anglo-Norman French mansel, one who occupied a manse (from Late Latin mansa ‘dwelling’), a measure of land sufficient to support one family.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Mauncell was born in 1472, in Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, John Mauncel, was 32 and his mother, Joan Savage, was 30. He married Sarah Isabel Wingfield in 1491, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in November 1545, in his hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in Halesowen, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Mauncell est né en 1472, à Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Mauncel, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Savage, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Isabel Wingfield en 1491, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en novembre 1545, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Halesowen, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Mauncell 1472 in Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Mauncel 32 und seine Mutter Joan Savage 30. Er hat 1491 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Sarah Isabel Wingfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb im November 1545 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Halesowen, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Mauncell è nato il nel 1472 nel Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, John Mauncel, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joan Savage, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Isabel Wingfield nel 1491, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1545, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Halesowen, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Mauncellが1472年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチチェリーで生まれた時，父John Mauncelは32歳，母Joan Savageは30歳であった。1491年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでSarah Isabel Wingfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1545年11月に故郷で73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアヘイレソウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Mauncell(이)가 1472년 영국 벅잉함실르 치셸이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mauncel(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Savage(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1491년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Sarah Isabel Wingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1545년 11월 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 헤일소웬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Mauncell nasceu em 1472, em Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Mauncel, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Savage, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Isabel Wingfield em 1491, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1545, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Halesowen, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Mauncell родился в 1472 г. в местности шичели, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Mauncel было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Savage, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Isabel Wingfield в 1491 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер ноябрь 1545 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности хэлесоуэн, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Mauncell nació en 1472, en Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Mauncel, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan Savage, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sarah Isabel Wingfield en 1491, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1545, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Halesowen, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
